rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF KATHERINE ESTHER HINES
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set One; Request For Production Of Documents And Things, Set One; Monetary Sanctions; And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Petitioner Alvin Hines' Motion to Compel Further Responses to Special Interrogatories, Set One and Request for Production of Documents and Things, Set One is granted. Respondent must serve Petitioner with further responses to Special Interrogatories, Set One and Request for Production of Documents and Things, Set One, without opposition, and to the best of the Respondent's ability, within ten (10) days of the Court's ruling. Petitioner's request for monetary sanctions is granted, in the amount of $1,460.00. Respondent must pay monetary sanctions to the Kathryn E. Hines Estate in the amount of $1,460.00 within twenty (20) days of the Court's ruling. This tentative ruling is late. Per Local Rule 14.10, the parties must appear unless all parties submit to a late tentative ruling, in which case the Court will adopt the late tentative ruling.

rulings.Rulings: Continued to 4/12/17. A filed stamped courtesy paper copy of all electronically filed documents requiring Court review or action needed to have been delivered not later than 1:30 p.m. of the day following electronic filing [Local Rule 2.11T]. Filed stamped copy must be delivered to Room 202 no later than 3 court days prior to continued hearing date, along with a proposed order.
